events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.

events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.

events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Rust Vega wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Sol Kai-II dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

narrative:
## Year 100

### Events
- [RED] **colonist_conflict**: Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.
- [GRN] **earth_contact**: Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.
- [YEL] **ice_volcano**: Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.

**Activity:** explore(4), pray(4), sabotage(3), code(2), mediate(2)
**Resources:** food:100%[OK] | water:100%[OK] | power:100%[OK] | air:100%[OK] | medicine:100%[OK]
**Cohesion:** 82%

### Sub-simulations (8)
- depth-1 dax-iron: 0.7667693648179715
- depth-1 zeph-wind: 1.0784497581147177
- depth-2 zeph-wind: 1.1862947339261896

*META: Rust Vega wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.*

*META: Sol Kai-II dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.*

diaries.text:
**Clay Kai** (air/sentinel) — Year 100

Another year. We are still here.

Tempers flared. It is each other that will kill us.
A message from Earth — like hearing from a ghost.

*— Clay Kai, sentinel*

**Pax Stone** (earth/judge) — Year 100

Another year. We are still here.

Tempers flared. It is each other that will kill us.
A message from Earth — like hearing from a ghost.

*— Pax Stone, judge*

**Iron Mar** (fire/scholar) — Year 100

Another year. We are still here.

Tempers flared. It is each other that will kill us.
A message from Earth — like hearing from a ghost.

*— Iron Mar, scholar*
